candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A line above operating profit, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'Cost of Goods Sold' because 'Cost of Goods Sold - Balancing value' plus this D&A equals reported 'Cost of Goods Sold'. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Goods Sold'. The explicit COGS D&A row is embedded in that reported total, so no separate add-back row should be selected.

candidates.why: There are explicit SG&A D&A rows shown separately above operating profit, adjacent to 'Distribution Costs' and 'Administrative Expenses'. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows were specifically the non-D&A component rows, so these D&A amounts sit outside the selected bucket and should be added separately later.

variables.notes: MANUALLY REMOVED.The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket uses 'Distribution Costs' and 'Administrative Expenses', which exclude D&A. Two separate rows with the identical label 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' appear to correspond to those SG&A components, so both occurrences should be added separately. No R&D row is visible, so no special R&D exclusion applies.
